scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env staging --remote
scripts.db:seed:local: npm run db:seed:build && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file db/seeds/0001_seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:staging: npm run db:seed:build && wrangler d1 execute DB --env staging --remote --file db/seeds/0001_seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:prod: npm run db:seed:build && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file db/seeds/0001_seed.sql
